initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED has $100 and is offering me $10. I currently have $0. This is a good offer for me, as it would increase my resources. Since I'm Player BLUE and it's not my final move, I can propose a counter offer if I want, but accepting seems reasonable.

```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering me $10, which is a good deal given I have nothing. I will accept the trade. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. Looking forward to having some dollars! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
